race.comment: GOT GUMPTION (2) is a handy four-year-old gelding who returned from a break last start and finished 0.9 lengths away in fourth over 1000m at Townsville. Strips fitter and rates a leading player. MELO MELO KAVA (8) finished fifth over 1000m at Townsville when resuming last start, beaten only one length. Nicely placed to play a pivotal role. HE'S THE ONE (6) finished second when resuming two runs back at this track then progressed nicely last time out to score by a long neck as favourite over 1200m at this track. Has his share of ability and will prove hard to beat in this suitable race. FIVE STAR KING (7) has not raced since finishing 2.75 lengths away in fourth over 1212m at Sale on March 1. Expect he is primed for a big first-up performance.
